creator: nicolas.marot@gmail.com
text:
On a fresh opnsense 23.1, based on FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p7
df -i reports there is no more inodes free on /boot/efi (msdosfs)

Filesystem                Type    1K-blocks    Used     Avail Capacity iused    ifree %iused  Mounted on
/dev/nvd0p2               ufs     232321560 2521472 211214364     1%   93483 29954515    0%   /
/dev/nvd0p1               msdosfs    262129    1742    260387     1%       0        0  100%   /boot/efi
